title: treesitter-parser-registry schema
description: Validates registry.json entries and query-repo parser.json manifests

inheritRef.description: Pinned parser version for one inherited lang. The installer uses parser_version as the checkout ref for that lang's parser.

parser_version.description: Exact git ref (tag or SHA) of the inherited lang's parser these queries are tested against.

parserManifest.description: parser.json inside each query repo or self-contained parser repo root

parser_version.description: Exact git ref (tag or SHA) of the parser repo that these queries are tested against. Used as the install target; overrides version discovery.

queries_dir.description: Parent directory whose <lang>/ subdirectory contains .scm files (e.g. 'nvim-queries'). Used by self-contained repos and the CI workflow.

queries_path.description: Direct path to directory containing .scm files. Mutually exclusive with queries_dir.

test_dir.description: Directory containing highlight assertion test files (e.g. 'tests/highlights'). Used by the self-contained validate workflow.

generate.description: Set true when the parser repo requires `tree-sitter generate` before compilation (no pre-built src/parser.c).

generate_from_json.description: When generate is true: true = use src/grammar.json, false = use grammar.js.

inherits.description: Pinned parser versions for each inherited lang. Keys are language names matching registry entries. Each value pins the parser ref these queries were tested against.

inject_deps.description: Languages whose parsers are needed at runtime to satisfy injection queries (e.g. html injects css and javascript). Used by test infrastructure to skip injection assertions when a dependency parser is not installed.

host_parser.description: For queries_only languages: the parser repo that provides the grammar these queries target. The CI workflow builds this parser and uses parser_aliases to map the queries-only language name to the host language.

lang.description: The host parser's language name (e.g. 'html' for html_tags, 'javascript' for ecma/jsx). Used to name the .so and create a parser_aliases entry.

parser_version.description: Exact git ref (tag or SHA) of the host parser to build for validation.

selfContainedSource.description: Parser and queries live in the same upstream repo. Exactly one of queries_path or queries_dir must be set.

queries_path.description: Path relative to repo root of the directory containing .scm files directly (e.g. 'queries' or 'queries/nvim'). Use when the query dir does not follow the <dir>/<lang>/ pattern.

queries_dir.description: Path relative to repo root of the parent directory whose <lang>/ subdirectory contains the .scm files (e.g. 'nvim-queries'). The installer appends /<lang> automatically.

generate.description: Set true when the parser repo requires `tree-sitter generate` before compilation. Lives here (not in parser.json) because self_contained has no separate query repo.

generate_from_json.description: When generate is true: true = use src/grammar.json, false = use grammar.js.

inject_deps.description: Languages whose parsers are needed at runtime to satisfy injection queries (e.g. html injects css and javascript). Used by test infrastructure to skip injection assertions when a dependency parser is not installed.
